    Class
    Description
    DBProxy
    Abstract claass for all handlers.
    Injector
    Central component responsible for dependency injection and object provisioning.
    LitePersistenceContext
    Interface to represent a persistence context.
    ProxyStore
    This is the class where all the proxy objects will be kept.
    TxnEntityManagerDelegate
    Delegate wrapper around an EntityManager that adds transaction-aware behavior.
